title: centaurea malacitana
intro: Centaurea malacitana, also known as the Malta Centaury or Mountain Spurrey, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, where it has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can help to soothe and calm the digestive system. The health benefits of Centaurea malacitana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture or infusion for herbal remedies, and can also be used as a dried herb in teas and capsules.
